findings.evidence: SPF result: fail. Envelope sender <attacker@evil.example> is not authorised to send on behalf of the From domain (trusted-bank.example).
From domain (trusted-bank.example) does not match envelope sender (evil.example) and DMARC did not pass.
DMARC validation failed for header.from=trusted-bank.example. Mail bypasses the domain owner's enforcement policy.
No Authentication-Results header present. SPF, DKIM, and DMARC cannot be verified for mail claiming to be from <Billing Department <billing@unknown-domain.example>>.
DMARC policy is p=none (monitoring only). Spoofed emails from this domain are reported but never quarantined or rejected by receiving servers.

summary: Analysed 4 email header samples; 3/4 had findings. 5 total finding(s) detected.
